posts.text:
I watch one game and the knicks lose 

I apologize to the entire city of nyc
you have to create if you want people to care

idc what anyone says, no gym on earth beats a simple garage gym

or I might just hate people on an insane level

god nyc is so ass

choosing to live here is a brain disease
is there a club in nyc that’s only playing lucki?
do not give in to nostalgia

I would like to ask the married ct bros a question. 

During a marriage, do you think both people like each other equally throughout the marriage or is there always one person chasing the other?

I've also been through multiple markets. IMO this one feels the worst because: 
- Crypto down bad while everything else (stocks, commodities, etc.) are up bigly. Comparison is the thief of joy

we got to celebrate our differences ♫

no one can predict how it trades from here
